mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM app_auction a where up_state = '1'
AND parking_place like concat('%',#{address},'%')
AND brand like concat('%',#{brand},'%')
limit #{current} ,#{size}
SELECT count(a.id) FROM app_auction a WHERE a.up_state = '1'

SELECT t1.id carId,t1.brand, t1.product_date as productDate, t1.register_date as registerDate, t1.mileage, t1.luxury_car_price as luxuryCarPrice, t1.first_amount as firstAmount, t1.phone as phoneNumber, CONCAT(CONCAT(LEFT(t1.product_date,4),'年'),' ',CONCAT(t1.mileage,'公里'))label , t1.price FROM app_auction t1 left join app_auction_up t2 on t1.id=t2.car_id WHERE t1.source_type = 2 and t1.car_state=7 and t1.up_state=1 and t2.begin_time < now() and t2.end_time > now()
AND t1.parking_place like concat('%',#{city},'%')
ORDER BY t1.price DESC
LIMIT #{page.currentResult},#{page.showCount}
